notes:
**New**

- **Drag images in from Finder** — drag one or more image files onto a note to
  add them (alongside paste, the `/image` picker, and image URLs). (PRD
  Addendum 17 §Q6.)
- **Each image is its own block** — so you can wiki-link, block-reference,
  collapse, and caption any image; a multi-image drop/paste is a single undo.
  Tall/portrait images are height-capped so they don't dominate the page. (§Q18.)
- **Image lightbox is a gallery** — click any image to view it full-resolution,
  then arrow (← →) through every image in the note. (§Q9.)
- **Attach screenshots to feedback** — add images (file or paste) to a bug
  report or suggestion. (PRD Addendum 14 §N2.)
